creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Hello Mark Linimon.

I created some patch, which may unbreak games/oolite build for armv6 (armv7) architecture(s), based on BROKEN_armv6 (BROKEN_armv7, BROKEN_aarch64) description(s), which you committed in ports r434890 ( ports r455167, ports r426197 ).
The overall patch includes adapted patches from lang/spidermonkey185 port, which based on ports r442611 changes. This is similar to what was done in ports r371389, when fixes for Clang was needed, but now for armv6 (armv7) architecture(s). I also added some changes, which may invalidate (or require to update) BROKEN_aarch64 description, with some (cosmetic) changes after ports r452037.

Could you please test attached patch (attachment #188867) in this PR for armv6 (or also for armv7, aarch64) architecture(s)?
I tried to propose related pathes for games/oolite update to 1.86 version in bug 223389, but since I didn't test them (and other reasons, based on feedback), I decided to remove such patches and propose simple update instead.

CC: linimon@
